summary: Navigation menu validation from home page testing sequential access to App Store, Services, Learning Hub, and Contact pages

content.objective: Verify that clicking the App Store navigation menu item successfully navigates to the clickapp page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the "App Store" navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the OneClick App heading
The page displays a form with app selection options

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Services navigation menu item successfully navigates to the services page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
validations: The page displays the Services heading
The page displays service information content

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Learning Hub navigation menu item successfully navigates to the academy page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
actions: Click the "Learning Hub" navigation menu item
validations: The page displays the OneDay Academy heading
The page displays a list of course cards

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Contact navigation menu item successfully navigates to the contact page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
validations: The page displays the Contact us heading
The page displays a contact form with fields
